Michael Thompson
Dallas, TX

Summary
Dedicated warehouse associate with over 1 year of experience in fast-paced environments. Proficient in operating RF scanners and performing inventory management. Committed to maintaining safety standards and ensuring efficient workflow. Strong ability to lift heavy items and work collaboratively with team members.

Experience
Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Dallas, TX  
January 2022 - Present  
- Operated RF scanners to track inventory and assist in the shipping and receiving process.  
- Collaborated with team members to ensure timely order fulfillment and maintained accurate inventory records.  
- Responsible for lifting and moving packages weighing up to 50 lbs regularly throughout the shift.  
- Assisted in organizing the warehouse layout to optimize efficiency and safety.

Shipping Clerk  
XYZ Distribution Center, Fort Worth, TX  
June 2021 - December 2021  
- Managed shipping documentation and prepared packages for dispatch.  
- Utilized basic computer skills to enter shipping information into the database.  
- Conducted quality control checks on outgoing shipments to ensure accuracy and completeness.

Certifications
- OSHA Forklift Safety Certification (2021)
